name: Herbag cloth handbag
description:
Feel free to message us for more details and photos before ordering.
Hermès Vintage Herbag 31 - Rare Black & White "Panda" Edition

Product Details:
Model: Herbag 31 (Shoulder Bag style)
Dimensions: 31 x 24 x 10 cm
Color: Black leather top flap with interchangeable Black and White canvas bodies
Hardware: Silver-tone (SHW)
Material: Leather and Canvas. (Note: The white replacement bag features a coated canvas finish, offering light water resistance and a stiffer, more structured shape).
Features: Includes two interchangeable canvas bags. Highly versatile design that can be reversed to showcase an exposed outer-stitching aesthetic.

Condition Report:
Excellent condition (98% New). The bag has been exceptionally well-maintained with very minimal signs of wear. Please review all photos carefully to confirm the exact condition before placing your order.

Style Notes:
This highly sought-after "Panda" colorway offers two distinct looks in one piece, seamlessly blending a cool, edgy vibe with an artistic flair. Vintage black and white Herbags are becoming increasingly rare to find on the market, making this an exceptional collector's piece at a great price.
